title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.788 - Police Surgeon James F Cooper MD Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on I-64 in St. Louis City
text:
227.788.  Police Surgeon James F Cooper MD Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on I-64 in St. Louis City. — The bridge on Interstate 64 crossing over Sarah Street in St. Louis City shall be designated as the "Police Surgeon James F Cooper MD Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 520)
